title: The 7 Best Utility Stocks to Buy Now

title: WEC Energy Group to announce 2022 second-quarter results Aug. 2
text: MILWAUKEE, July 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- WEC Energy Group Inc. (NYSE: WEC) will issue its 2022 second-quarter earnings news release before the stock market opens Tuesday, Aug. 2. A conference call for investors and security analysts is scheduled for the same day at 1 p.m.

title: Charles Matthews Named to ALLETE Board of Directors
text: DULUTH, Minn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ALLETE Inc.'s board of directors has elected Charles Matthews to serve on the board effective July 6, 2022.

title: WEC or PEG: Which Utility Stock Should Be Your Pick in 2022?
text: On the back of a more robust estimate revision, solid capital investment and low debt-to-capital ratio, WEC Energy (WEC) seems better placed than Public Service Enterprise (PEG).
